name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident in Sandy, too late?
description: Report within 180 days; doctor links delayed symptoms.[1]

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident in Sandy, too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report within 180 days; doctor links delayed symptoms.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, report when symptoms appear if linked to work; Utah allows up to 180 days.** Delayed injuries like back pain qualify.[1] Key factors: Prove connection via doctor. Insurer has 21-45 days to decide. Keep timeline records. Early medical ties it to incident.
